channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2025-26 NBA Title Odds: Thunder, Nuggets Hold Steady; Spurs Surge
item.description: Which NBA team is favored to take home the Larry O'Brien Trophy at the end of the season? See the latest odds.

item.title: USA's Best World Baseball Classic Lineup: Assembling A Historic Squad
item.description: How might USA deploy its best roster ever? Breaking down the lineup, arms and decisions for manager Mark DeRosa.

item.title: 2026 NCAA Tournament Projections: How the Big Ten Can Become an 11-Bid Conference
item.description: FOX Sports' bracket forecaster Mike DeCourcy offers up his latest men's NCAA Tournament projections.

item.title: NFL Combine: Chiefs GM Brett Veach Hopeful That Travis Kelce Returns in 2026
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs GM Brett Veach said he's had continued dialogue with tight end Travis Kelce with the hope of him returning to the fold.

item.title: USA World Cup Spotlight: Big News On The Injury Front As Tyler Adams Returns
item.description: A trio of USA players who could be pivotal at the World Cup returned to action from various injuries.

item.title: Falcons GM: QB Cousins to be released March 11
item.description: New Falcons GM Ian Cunningham has informed QB Kirk Cousins that the team will release him March 11, the first day of the league year, Cunningham said ...

item.title: Texans GM: Stroud trade speculation is 'moronic'
item.description: Texans GM Nick Caserio called the trade talk regarding quarterback C.J. Stroud "moronic."

item.title: GM: Sanders, Watson both in mix for Browns QB1
item.description: Shedeur Sanders and Deshaun Watson are in the mix to be the Browns' starter, but GM Andrew Berry noted Tuesday that the decision doesn't need to be ma...

item.title: What's next for the NBA's 10 worst teams: Evaluating draft, free agency and trade options
item.description: Our NBA insiders break down the biggest questions for 10 lottery-bound teams after the trade deadline and ahead of the draft.

item.title: Jets GM: Plan to keep RB Hall, with deal or tag
item.description: The Jets will use one of the tags at their disposal on running back Breece Hall if they can't reach an agreement with the running back before Tuesday'...
